programmes.show_description: With the promise of an inheritance from her grandfather spurring her, Emma promises to tutor a gifted violinist, unaware her grandfather is playing matchmaker from the grave. (2025)
When Lolly's Aunt Gert gives her three magical lemon drops, she gets to experience what her life would have been like if she had lived her unfulfilled dreams. (2023)
When Celeste loses her teaching job, her boss puts her forward for an au-pair job with infamous New York property tycoon Richard Trapp. (2024)
Teleshopping.

Teleshopping.
As the Easter holiday approaches, a woman rediscovers a blessing bracelet that helps restore her faith and renew her belief in love. (2023)
The owner of a popular café could lose everything when a major celebrity is dumped there. Can she get him and his would-be-fiancee back together, or will she fall for him herself? (2023)
As a single mother to her deaf son, Allie does not have much time to go out on dates. But when a handsome new tenant moves in, it looks like love has arrived at her doorstep. (2023)
Struggling to save her farm, a woman enters a floral design contest, where she develops a blossoming romance with a local pastor. (2023)
Recently single Stephanie moves to Miami and takes a job working as a tutor. But when her love for their father grows, the two kids decide to put a stop to it. (2023)
When aspiring music producer Chloe lands her first gig working with former rising star Dustin, they race to create an epic song of the summer. (2024)
All Stella wants is to take over her family-run restaurant in the US and marry her boyfriend. But when everything falls apart, she travels to London to begin a new path. (2024)
When a music label executive goes to a festival on the Outer Banks to check out an elusive new band, she discovers that the group is fronted by her childhood sweetheart. (2023)
When a junior PR professional runs into a former flame who broke her heart at a quaint B&B, she pretends the owner is her new boyfriend. (2023)
After receiving a letter in a nightclub, the Postables are whisked on a trip to find the writer hiding from a troubled past, as Oliver learns more about his father. (2025)
40-year-old book editor Juniper is magically reconnected with an eight-year-old version of herself who questions her life choices, including the dream of writing her own stories. (2024)

Contest winners try to solve a fake murder for a grand prize, but the event goes awry when a real murder occurs and secrets are uncovered. Cozy crime thriller. (2025)
As she enters a new chapter in her life, a bookstore owner finds love and purpose after agreeing to review a famous author's new novel. (2024)
The iciest of hearts melt when a preppy avalanche expert and a no-nonsense rescue ranger are stationed at the same mountain park. (2023)
After their fake marriage proposal is filmed goes viral, Millie and Leo must keep up the ruse while ignoring their growing feelings. (2023)
Abril goes to Argentina to save her family ranch from being bought by her ex. But when the ranch is threatened, the pair must come together, rekindling their love in the process. (2025)
A single mum agrees to be the partner of a bird enthusiast for a competition but misunderstands and tells everyone she's his new girlfriend instead of just his teammate. (2025)
When a couple can't decide on a theme for their upcoming wedding, they end up hiring two wedding planners, Taylor and Ben, to compete for the job. (2023)
Five years after finding a spark with a stranger on a train platform, a photographer finds himself seated next to the same woman on a plane heading to the same wedding - hers. (2023)
